title: EVA history
wikitext:
[]: EVA history?             Quote Post by juaxoo » Fri Mar 18, 2011 12:22 am hello everyone, i came by this definition on urbandictionary the other day, http://www.urbandictionary.com/define.php?term=Neon%20Genesis%20Evangelion&defid=3973064 i thought it was very well written and funny, but is it accurate at all? maybe it was written based on key facts with a little author's own humor reimagine? can someone who knows a great deal of eva's and or anno's history clear this up for me? thank you very much in advance

[]:             Quote Post by TaintedHero » Fri Mar 18, 2011 1:14 am Most of it is pretty accurate. The fact that it seems like you are using the urban dictionary, a site almost dedicated to naming sex positions and other profanities, as a source of actual information is a little unnerving. A source like This might actually help. This may help even more. I am not going to dig around for the thread about this at this time because I should be asleep and I'm procrastinating, but if no one gives a concrete answer by when i wake up I'll post something worth while.

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Fri Mar 18, 2011 4:57 am your answer is good enough thank you. plus you mentioned the exact reason why i might be searching NGE on urbandictionary, for some lols

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Fri Mar 18, 2011 5:48 am TaintedHero wrote: Most of it is pretty accurate. The fact that it seems like you are using the urban dictionary, a site almost dedicated to naming sex positions and other profanities, as a source of actual information is a little unnerving.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Mar 18, 2011 4:39 pm TaintedHero wrote: The fact that it seems like you are using the urban dictionary... as a source of actual information is a little unnerving. A source like This might actually help.

[]:             Quote Post by violaine » Fri Mar 18, 2011 4:55 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: My irony alert meter just went off the chart.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Mar 18, 2011 5:09 pm violaine wrote: i'd think that wikipedia is at least bit better urban dictionary.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Mar 18, 2011 5:21 pm TaintedHero wrote: Most of it is pretty accurate. The fact that it seems like you are using the urban dictionary, a site almost dedicated to naming sex positions and other profanities, as a source of actual information is a little unnerving.

[]:             Quote Post by TaintedHero » Fri Mar 18, 2011 5:52 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Properly referenced Wikipedia articles are fine, but the non-EGF NGE Wiki page is NOT such an example.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Fri Mar 18, 2011 5:53 pm Speaking of wikipedia, someone needs to give the NGE pages there some attention. And I'm talking about the Good Article type of attention.
